artifact_summary: This screenshot displays a SCADA system faceplate for a specific valve, showing operational metrics and event counts.
artifact_blurb: This screenshot displays the Open/Close Valve Faceplate for Knife Gate No.1, identified by the tag H-010-KV047-101-01. The interface presents a list of operational statistics including successful closing counts (10), successful opening counts (11), and incomplete counts for both actions. It also tracks slow operation events, specifically listing 8 slow closing counts and 11 slow opening counts, alongside buttons to clear these specific count categories.
